programme.title: BBC News at Six
programme.desc: The latest national and international news stories from the BBC, with reports from correspondents worldwide.

programme.title: The One Show
programme.desc: Topical magazine show featuring celebrity interviews, consumer stories, and live music performances.

programme.title: EastEnders
programme.desc: Drama unfolds in Walford as the residents of Albert Square face new challenges and old rivalries resurface.

programme.title: MasterChef
programme.desc: The remaining contestants face their toughest challenge yet in the semi-final, cooking a three-course meal for twenty diners.

programme.title: BBC News at Ten
programme.desc: The day's top stories. National and international news, with in-depth analysis and expert commentary.

programme.title: Eggheads
programme.desc: Quiz show pitting a team of challengers against the formidable Eggheads.

programme.title: Great British Menu
programme.desc: Chefs compete to cook a banquet dish celebrating British culinary traditions.

programme.title: Springwatch
programme.desc: Live wildlife cameras capture the drama of spring across the British countryside.

programme.title: QI
programme.desc: Sandi Toksvig hosts the panel show where obscure facts and unlikely answers score the most points.

programme.title: ITV News at 6
programme.desc: National and regional news, sport and weather updates.

programme.title: Emmerdale
programme.desc: Life in the Yorkshire Dales village brings drama, romance, and conflict to its close-knit community.

programme.title: Coronation Street
programme.desc: Secrets are revealed on the cobbles as the residents of Weatherfield navigate love, loss, and neighbourhood gossip.

programme.title: Vera
programme.desc: Detective Chief Inspector Vera Stanhope investigates a suspicious death at a remote Northumberland coastal village.

programme.title: Channel 4 News
programme.desc: In-depth analysis of the day's news stories with Jon Snow and the reporting team.

programme.title: The Great British Bake Off
programme.desc: The bakers face pastry week with a challenging technical and a spectacular showstopper.

programme.title: Taskmaster
programme.desc: Five comedians tackle bizarre and inventive tasks set by the Taskmaster and his loyal assistant.

programme.title: 5 News at 5
programme.desc: The latest headlines and breaking news.

programme.title: GPs: Behind Closed Doors
programme.desc: Cameras follow doctors and patients at a busy GP surgery in the heart of England.

programme.title: Ben Fogle: New Lives in the Wild
programme.desc: Ben Fogle visits a couple who left their city lives behind to build a self-sufficient homestead in rural Wales.

programme.title: Sky News at Six
programme.desc: A comprehensive look at the day's biggest stories, with live reports and expert analysis.

programme.title: Sky News Tonight
programme.desc: In-depth reporting and interviews on the stories that matter.

programme.title: Sky News Documentary: The Climate Files
programme.desc: An investigation into how governments and corporations are responding to the escalating climate crisis, featuring exclusive interviews and leaked documents.

programme.title: Would I Lie to You?
programme.desc: Lee Mack and David Mitchell's teams try to fool each other with outrageous truths and convincing lies.

programme.title: Mock the Week
programme.desc: Comedians take on the week's biggest news stories with sharp wit and topical humour.

programme.title: Red Dwarf
programme.desc: Lister, Rimmer, Cat, and Kryten encounter a derelict ship with a cargo of simulants in deep space.

programme.title: QI XL
programme.desc: The extended version of the hit panel show with additional questions and even more quite interesting facts.

programme.title: Blade Runner 2049
programme.desc: Officer K, a new blade runner for the LAPD, unearths a long-buried secret that has the potential to plunge what's left of society into chaos. Denis Villeneuve's stunning sequel to the 1982 sci-fi classic.

programme.title: Arrival
programme.desc: When mysterious spacecraft touch down across the globe, a linguistics professor is tasked with interpreting the language of the alien visitors. Denis Villeneuve directs this thought-provoking sci-fi drama.
